tagline: The Art of Swimming Pools and Spas

hero.badge_1: BBB A+ Rated | Serving SE Wisconsin Since 1998
hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool, Built One Project
at a Time
hero.subheadline: For over 25 years, Wisconsin families have trusted us to design and build pools that turn backyards into personal retreats. From custom construction to weekly care, we handle every detail so you can simply enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Solutions<br class="hidden md:block">From Build to Maintenance
services.subtitle: Whether you're dreaming of a brand-new pool or need expert care for the one you have, our team brings 25+ years of hands-on experience to every project in Southeastern Wisconsin.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Full design and build services for inground swimming pools, tailored to your property, style, and budget. Proven construction techniques and quality equipment for results that last decades.

cards.title: Hot Tub & Spa Sales
cards.description: Luxury spa and swim spa sales, installation, and ongoing service. Find the perfect relaxation solution for your Wisconsin home with expert guidance from our team.

cards.title: Pool Liner Replacement
cards.description: Restore your pool's appearance and prevent leaks with professional liner replacement. We use high-quality materials for long-lasting durability and a fresh new look.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, saltwater systems, automation, and autocovers. We upgrade your pool equipment for improved efficiency, convenience, and lower operating costs.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Complete renovation and redesign of existing pools to modernize the look, improve functionality, and boost your property value. Transform your outdated pool into a showpiece.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Routine weekly care to keep your pool clean, chemically balanced, and running at peak performance all season long. Enjoy your pool without the weekend chores.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Pool

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us about your dream pool or current service needs. We'll schedule a free on-site consultation and provide an honest, no-pressure estimate tailored to your property and budget.

steps.title: We Bring It to Life
steps.description: Our experienced team handles every detail from custom design through construction or service. With 25+ years of craftsmanship, we build one quality project at a time so nothing gets rushed.

steps.title: Dive In & Enjoy
steps.description: Your backyard is transformed into a personal oasis. And with our ongoing maintenance services, your pool stays pristine all season while you simply enjoy the water with family and friends.

about.label: Why Wisconsin Families Choose Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Craftsmanship Since 1998
about.description: Accurate Pool & Spa Services was built on a simple promise: one quality project at a time. For over 25 years, Paul and the team have worked closely with each client across Watertown, Lake Country, and Southeastern Wisconsin to create custom pools and spas that fit their vision and budget. Our reputation has been built almost entirely through customer referrals, and that says everything about how we do business.

features.title: 25+ Years Hands-On Experience
features.description: Every project benefits from decades of real-world pool construction and service knowledge. No subcontractors, no shortcuts.

features.title: One Project at a Time Focus
features.description: We dedicate our full attention to each build. Your project never competes with a dozen others for our time and care.

features.title: Built on Referrals
features.description: Our strongest marketing is word of mouth from satisfied customers. We earn every recommendation through quality work and honest service.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed, honest estimate. We work with your budget to deliver the best possible result — no hidden fees, no bait-and-switch.

guarantee.headline: Our Craftsmanship Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every pool we build and every service we perform. If something is not right, we come back and make it right — no questions asked, no extra charges. After 25+ years in business, our name is our reputation, and we protect it on every single project.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool projects take 6-10 weeks depending on design complexity, permits, and weather. We'll give you a realistic timeline during your free consultation and keep you updated every step of the way.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We service all inground pools in the Watertown, Lake Country, and Southeastern Wisconsin area regardless of who built them. Our maintenance, repair, and upgrade services are available for any pool owner.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Watertown, Lake Country, and all of Southeastern Wisconsin. If you're unsure whether you're in our service area, just give Paul a call at (920) 988-1157 and we'll let you know.

faqs.question: Can you help me design a pool that fits my budget?
faqs.answer: That's what we do best. We work closely with every client to create a custom design that matches your personal taste and budget. We'll present options and help you prioritize features so you get the most value.

faqs.question: Do you sell and install hot tubs and swim spas?
faqs.answer: Yes! We carry luxury spas and swim spas with full installation and ongoing service. Visit our showroom in Watertown or call to schedule a consultation. We'll help you find the perfect spa for your home and lifestyle.

testimonials.name: Leah W.
testimonials.text: Paul was wonderful in helping us out. He answered my millions of questions, made sure we had the supplies and preplanning we needed, and was available evenings and weekends. We will be making the drive to Watertown for all of our pool needs!

testimonials.name: Chris B.
testimonials.text: Our pool looks great, and they made it happen before Memorial Day! The whole process was smooth and the team really delivered on their promise of quality craftsmanship.

testimonials.name: Trent N.
testimonials.text: Paul's always great to work with and he always fits us in his busy schedule. After years of working with Accurate Pool, I wouldn't trust anyone else with our pool.

contact.headline:
Ready to Build Your
Dream Pool?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation consultation from a family-owned team with 25+ years of experience. We'll visit your property, discuss your vision, and provide an honest estimate.
